lines.text: POV: You are watching peak MS Dhoni behind the stumps. 🚁
Jethalal level problems require Taarak Mehta level solutions.
CSK vs MI rivalry hits different. Who's winning this year? 👇
Smooth transitions don't build character. Keyframes do.
Bro thinks he's the main character... (he just learned CapCut)

engagement: Road to 10K Subs! Smash the button.
